event.title: Panel discussion: "What does Digital Sovereignty mean for the Civil Society?" organised by ISOC - Switzerland Chapter in Zurich, Switzerland

body.p: On 27 March 2026, from 18:00 to 20:30, Dario Presutti, FSFE's Policy Project Manager, will take part in a panel discussion organised by the Swiss Chapter of the Internet Society. The discussion will delve into the topic of digital soverignity and its meaning for civil society. The discussion will be followed by a social event. Location of the event is L200, Langstrasse 200 8005 Zurich. Everyone is welcome to join!
